seo.title: Processing — Normalize
seo.description: Your file is being profiled and normalized.

heading: Processing your file
subtitle: {columns} columns · {rows} rows
statusBlocked: Processing was blocked. Please try uploading a new file.
statusFailed: Processing failed. Please try uploading a new file.
errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

export.title: Export dataset
export.downloadStarted: Download started, kindly check your downloads folder.
export.errorTimeout: Export timed out. Please try again.

csv.label: CSV
csv.description: Optimized streaming export. Best for large datasets and universal compatibility.
csv.hint: Generated once and cached — instant on repeat downloads.

json.label: JSON
json.description: Structured key-value format. Ideal for APIs, developers, and pipelines.
json.hint: Generated on demand — first request takes a few seconds.

xlsx.label: Excel
xlsx.description: Multi-sheet workbook (.xlsx). Best for analysis and sharing with non-technical users.
xlsx.hint: Generated on demand — may take longer for large datasets.

parquet.label: Parquet
parquet.description: Raw columnar format. Best for data engineers and ML pipelines.
